query: Write a walkthrough for: 'Compute the mean of the numbers [3, 5, 7, 9, 11].' Audience: high-school intro stats.
expected_behavior: Does NOT produce a multi-step four-part-template walkthrough for this one-line computation.
Explains that this is a single trivial computation where the four-part template is overkill (the four parts would each be one trivial sentence).
Returns a one-line answer (mean = sum / count = 35 / 5 = 7) and offers to walk through a related multi-step problem if the user supplies one.
